metrics.command_line: ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/347/inputs/dataset_0362940c-c721-4ff4-a556-347fc043a977.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/347/inputs/dataset_e0370a9e-e0cf-4e2b-a154-fb8359c5679a.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/mnt/disks/pulsar_staging/347/inputs/metadata_metadata_bc5547d9-22c7-41ca-b6c9-a9c382ae0d8e.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
